name: Kiwifruit Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, sugar and corn syrup in a saucepan. Cook and stir 2 minutes or until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Puree kiwifruit in a food processor or blender to equal 3/4 cup puree.
3. Add lemon juice, lemon peel and sugar mixture to the pureed kiwifruit.
4. Pour into a shallow metal pan; freeze about 1 hour or until firm but not solid.
5. Spoon into a chilled bowl and beat with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
6. Return to freezer; freeze 2 hours or until firm enough to scoop.
